{{Quote|Lando Calrissian won the coveted taxi-service license rights for Ord Wylan in a sabacc game, and lost them moments later in an idle bet concerning the brand of a liquor his party was consuming.|A news report by Cynabar's InfoNet|<ref name="GNN">{{JournalCite|5|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
'''Ord Wylan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Oktos sector/Legends|Oktos sector]]. During the [[Pius Dea Era]], between [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]], it served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] won the license rights for the [[Air taxi/Legends|taxi]] service on Ord Wylan in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game but lost them shortly afterward.

==Description==
Ord Wylan<ref name="GNN" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE Ord">{{CSWECite|II|419|Ord}} states that the term "[[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]]" and the abbreviation "Ord" applied to certain [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].</ref> located in the [[Ord Wylan system/Legends|Ord Wylan system]], a part of the [[Oktos sector/Legends|Oktos sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA Wylan" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
Ord Wylan served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]], despite it being located just outside the borders of Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. Specifically, the world served as the launching point for Republic attacks against the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]-allied worlds of [[Toydaria/Legends|Toydaria]] and [[Circumtore/Legends|Circumtore]], in the [[First Pius Dea Crusade]] of [[11,965 BBY]] and the [[Thirty-Fourth Pius Dea Crusade]] of [[11,057 BBY]], respectively.<ref name="EGTW" />

Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|421|Ord Wylan}}</ref> [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later,<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> a [[Air taxi/Legends|taxi]] service existed on Ord Wylan, the license rights for which had become highly sought after. During that time, the [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] won the rights in a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]], although he lost them only moments later in a bet over the brand of [[Liquor/Legends|liquor]] the players were [[Foodstuff/Legends|drinking]]. By the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[0 ABY/Legends|36:1:16]], that fact was mentioned in a news report by [[Cynabar's InfoNet/Legends|Cynabar's InfoNet]], issued from the [[Nar Shaddaa Node]] on<ref name="GNN" /> the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="GNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ord Wylan was first introduced by [[Paul Sudlow]] in the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature of [[West End Games]]' [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]], which was published in [[February]] [[1995]].<ref name="GNN" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ord Wylan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square R-12.<ref name="TEA Wylan" />
